SEARCH

Package com.example.moogerscouncil

package com.example.moogerscouncil
  • Class
    Description
    Appointment
    Represents a confirmed appointment between a student and counselor.
    AppointmentAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for the counselor's appointment dashboard cards.
    AppointmentAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for a single appointment card.
    AppointmentRepository
    Repository for the Firestore 'appointments' collection.
    AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback
    Callback for operations that return a list of appointments.
    AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback
    Three-way callback for the booking transaction.
    AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback
    Callback for appointment status update operations.
    AvailabilityRepository
    Repository for the Firestore 'slots' collection.
    AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotActionCallback
    Callback for slot write operations (add / remove).
    AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotsLoadedCallback
    Callback for operations that return a list of time slots.
    AvailabilitySchedule
    Local (non-Firestore) model that groups TimeSlot objects by date for a single counselor.
    AvailabilitySetupActivity
    Screen where a counselor can view their existing time slots, add new ones via date/time pickers, and swipe-to-delete available slots.
    BookingActivity
    Booking screen for students.
    BookingConfirmationFragment
    Bottom sheet that shows a booking summary before the student confirms.
    BookingConfirmationFragment.OnConfirmListener
    Callback fired when the student taps "Confirm Booking".
    CalendarActivity
    Calendar screen for students showing appointments on a selected date.
    Counselor
    Represents a counselor profile in the BetterCAPS system.
    CounselorAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for the counselor directory list.
    CounselorAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for a single counselor card.
    CounselorDashboardActivity
    Dashboard for logged-in counselors.
    CounselorListActivity
    Displays a searchable, filterable directory of all counselors.
    CounselorProfileActivity
    Full counselor profile view for students.
    CounselorProfileEditActivity
    Activity for counselors to edit their own profile.
    CounselorRepository
    Repository for the Firestore 'counselors' collection.
    CounselorRepository.OnCounselorFetchedCallback
    Callback for operations that return a single counselor.
    CounselorRepository.OnCounselorsLoadedCallback
    Callback for operations that return a list of counselors.
    CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback
    Callback for write operations (update / set).
    EmergencyDialogFragment
    Emergency contact dialog accessible from the student home screen.
    FeedbackRepository
    Repository for the Firestore 'feedback' collection.
    FeedbackRepository.OnFeedbackCheckCallback
    Callback for checking whether feedback already exists for an appointment.
    FeedbackRepository.OnFeedbackSubmittedCallback
    Callback for feedback submission operations.
    FeedbackService
    Represents an anonymous post-session feedback submission.
    HistoryActivity
    Displays the student's past and upcoming appointments in date order.
    HomeActivity
     
    LoginActivity
    Login screen.
    MainActivity
    Main entry point of the app.
    PrivacyPolicyActivity
    Displays the BetterCAPS privacy policy and requires the user to acknowledge it before proceeding to the application.
    QuizActivity
    Multi-step questionnaire that guides students through a brief assessment and recommends a counselor match.
    RegisterActivity
    Registration screen.
    SessionCache
    Application-scoped in-memory cache for frequently accessed Firestore data.
    SpecializationTags
    String constants for counselor specialization tags.
    Student
    Represents a registered student user in the BetterCAPS system.
    StudentAppointmentAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for the student's appointment history screen.
    StudentAppointmentAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for a single appointment history card.
    StudentHomeActivity
    Student home dashboard shown after successful login or registration.
    TimeSlot
    Represents a bookable time slot for a counseling session.
    TimeSlotAdapter
     
    TimeSlotAdapter.OnBookClickListener
     
    TimeSlotAdapter.ViewHolder
     
    UserRepository
    Repository for the Firestore 'users' collection.
    UserRepository.OnRoleFetchedCallback
    Callback for role-only fetch operations used for post-login routing.
    UserRepository.OnUserCreatedCallback
    Callback for user creation operations.
    UserRepository.OnUserFetchedCallback
    Callback for user fetch operations that return a full Student object.
    UserRepository.OnUserNameCallback
    Callback for name-only user lookups.
    UserRole
    String constants for user roles stored in Firestore.
